---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Computational biology · Multi-omics analysis · Pipeline development"
page-layout: article
toc: false
listing:
  - id: phase-cards
    contents: "phases/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "filename asc"
    fields: [image, title, description]                
    grid-columns: 3
---

## NeuroPGx-MultiOmics

Pharmacogenomic analysis of psychiatric brain transcriptomics using fully
open-access data. This project integrates CYP2C19 activity scores (primary)
and CYP2D6 scores (exploratory) with multi-region RNA-seq and postmortem
scATAC-seq data.

**Strategy:** CYP2C19-primary (reliable SNP-based calling) · CYP2D6-secondary (CNV limitations documented)

**Demonstrates:** End-to-end multi-omics pipeline execution from raw data to interpretable biological insights.

**Methods:** PharmCAT · DESeq2 · MOFA2 · DIABLO · XGBoost · SHAP · PyTorch · Docker

**Full Code:** [[GitHub](https://github.com/codymgeoffroy/NeuroPGx-MultiOmics)]

---

::: {#phase-cards}
:::
